name: Islamic Hubb
description: Islamic Hubb is a dedicated center for Quranic learning and Islamic sciences, offering structured long-term and short-term programs for children, youth, and adults. Our classes blend traditional scholarship with caring mentorship so every student grows in knowledge, adab, and service.
mission: To cultivate a generation rooted in the Quran and Sunnah by providing authentic, accessible, and nurturing Islamic education that transforms lives and communities.
vision: To be a trusted hub for Islamic learning in India that raises confident scholars, compassionate leaders, and God-conscious families.

values.title: Quran-Centered Learning
values.description: Every program strengthens recitation, understanding, and love of the Quran.

values.title: Tarbiya & Character
values.description: We emphasize adab, discipline, and spiritual growth alongside academics.

values.title: Community Service
values.description: Students are guided to serve their families and neighborhoods with ihsan.

values.title: Inclusive Mentorship
values.description: Dedicated faculty support learners of all ages through personalized guidance.
